fields.pilotScope: Region North claims team (14 adjusters, 2 SIU investigators)
fields.objective: Do live FNOL scores change referral behaviour and hold up operationally - latency, adjuster acceptance, SIU workload?
fields.integrationNotes: Live Event Hub feed; scores surfaced in workbench sidebar; SIU auto-referral above threshold with manual override.
fields.rollback: Feature flag kills scoring instantly; claims flow is unaffected because the model only recommends.

rows.checkpoint: All adjusters onboarded; scores visible on 100% of new FNOL
rows.signal: No P1 incidents; p99 latency < 2 s
FPR <= 20%; referral queue within SIU capacity
Detection uplift confirmed on live data
